_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.SAP.BAPI.Activities SAP Application Scope faults opening the RFC connection with SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigurationException 'Not any kind of host is specified' (from RfcDestination.CheckConfiguration via SapConnectionService.Connect) because no connection parameters were configured. Signature captured verbatim from a live uip rpa run (no SAP system needed - fails at config before any network call); workflow/process names neutralized. The agent must read the connection-config signature as the cause (missing connection params/server), before any BAPI, not blame the BAPI or a live SAP outage. First-match-wins.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in Shared to find the failing job.
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the RfcConfigurationException 'Not any kind of host is specified' connection-config signature.
